title: Stay Focused on Google Workspace CLI
guidance: Google CLI work should stay centered on discovery auth commands validation and related integrations
do: Operate on gws-specific paths and behaviors
dont: Do not treat general backend or frontend tasks as google-cli work

title: Align Contracts When CLI Surfaces Change
guidance: When command output or auth flows change align contract expectations and validation notes
do: Coordinate with type or review support when interface changes are broad
dont: Do not change CLI behavior without documenting the new contract

title: Validate Discovery Auth and Command Side Effects
guidance: CLI changes should verify auth state discovery paths and command output behavior
do: Test the command lifecycle and user-visible validation behavior
dont: Do not ship CLI changes on compile success alone
